transcription.text: If there's one thing the human foot has always been good at, it's unleashing great power. The IS Performance Line just got a power boost. Introducing the Lexus IS 200 Turbo and IS 300 All-Wheel Drive V6. The IS Line has never been more powerful. Lease the 2016 IS 200 Turbo or the 2016 IS 300 All-Wheel Drive for these terms. See the Lexus.

segments.text: If there's one thing the human foot has always been good at, it's unleashing great power.
The IS Performance Line just got a power boost.
Introducing the Lexus IS 200 Turbo and IS 300 All-Wheel Drive V6.
The IS Line has never been more powerful.
Lease the 2016 IS 200 Turbo or the 2016 IS 300 All-Wheel Drive for these terms.

metadata.title: 2015 Lexus IS The Pursuit of Perfection The Human Foot
